prestazioni: Engine: N74B66C (6.6L V12 twin-turbo) - Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbos (1.45 A/R, 88mm compressor wheels) paired with **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675** wastegates for 1200+ HP capability. Custom **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors** and **Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump** to support E85 flex-fuel tuning.

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP95X 8-speed automatic transmission** reinforced with **Porsche 911 GT3 RS (992) torque converter** and **South Bend Clutch Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch** for 1,000+ Nm torque capacity. **Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential** with 40% lockup under load, paired with **GKN VL3 high-performance driveshafts**.

Suspension/Handling: **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** with **Eibach Pro-Street S springs** (20mm drop) and **H&R 28mm front / 25mm rear sway bars**. **AP Racing 6-piston front / 4-piston rear brake calipers** with **380mm DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Ferodo DS3.12 race pads**. **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (275/35R21 front, 295/30R21 rear) on **BBS FI-R 21x10.5 ET35 (front) / 21x12 ET45 (rear)** forged wheels.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (G70-specific) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (3D-scanned for N74 engine bay clearance) and **rear diffuser** integrated with **Akrapović titanium exhaust tips**. **Vorsteiner G70 carbon fiber hood** with **functional N74 heat extractor vents** and **custom LED-illuminated kidney grilles** (RGB, 16.8M colors).

**BMW M Performance Carbon Core** delete with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** (XPEL Stealth finish) and **Gyeon Ceramic Coating** (9H hardness). **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** (8,000K CCT) with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** (5,500K) and **custom sequential turn signals** (OEM+ integration via **BMW Coding Tool**).

**Recaro Sportster CS seats** (full carbon shell, Alcantara/leather) with **Schroth Profi II-6 harnesses** and **custom rear seat delete** (replaced with **carbon fiber storage pods** for **Rotiform RSE-10 spare wheel** and **Motec PDM15 power distribution module**). **Custom N74 engine bay dress-up** with **carbon fiber intake plenums**, **anodized gold hardware**, and **LED under-hood lighting** (Philips Ultinon Pro9000).
